description: Report-only allowlist for intentional raw authority edges. Each entry must explain why the edge is raw and what Effect or Schema boundary contains it.

entries.reason: This is the Worker named JSON boundary. Raw parse is intentionally centralized here before callers decode or narrow unknown values.
Bootstrap is a CLI edge adapter. It accepts process env as raw input and turns it into a bounded bootstrap summary for downstream code.
Pylon CLI/node startup is an entry edge where Effect programs are finally bridged into Bun process execution.
OpenRouterClientLive is the provider HTTP adapter. It wraps fetch in Effect.tryPromise, tagged errors, timeout, retry, and redacted config.
